name: t1557_004_shadow_read
query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

name: t1557_004_proc_cred
query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;

name: t1557_004_file_access
query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;
